tools.title: Tools
tools.card.moreToolsTitle: {count, plural, one {# more tool} other {# more tools}}
tools.add.title: Add tools
tools.add.description: Tools will appear automatically when you connect a MCP server. Or, register a REST endpoint as a standalone tool.
tools.delete.confirm.title: Delete tool
tools.delete.confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
tools.table.name: Name
tools.form.description: Convert REST API to a tool and expose it for use
tools.form.name: Name
tools.form.schema.description: Autogenerate from OpenAPI spec or add schema manually
tools.form.schema.specUrlLabel: Or provide a direct OpenAPI spec URL
tools.form.schema.overwrite.title: Replace existing schema?
tools.form.schema.overwrite.description: Generating from OpenAPI will overwrite the input and output schemas you've already entered. Do you want to continue?
tools.form.error.nameMax: Name must be less than 100 characters
tools.form.error.urlProtocol: URL must start with http:// or https://
tools.form.error.descriptionMax: Description must be less than 500 characters
tools.form.error.teamRequired: Team selection is required when visibility is set to team
tools.form.error.inputSchemaInvalid: Input schema is not valid JSON
tools.form.error.outputSchemaInvalid: Output schema is not valid JSON
tools.form.error.generateSchemaUrl: Failed to generate schema. Check the URL and try again.
tools.form.error.generateSchema.ssrf: URL not reachable from the gateway (blocked by SSRF protection)
tools.form.error.generateSchema.notFound: The path {path} with method {method} is not in the OpenAPI spec
tools.form.error.generateSchema.fetchFai: Couldn't fetch the OpenAPI spec — check that the URL is correct and reachable
tools.form.error.generateSchema.specAuth: The OpenAPI spec endpoint requires authentication (returned 401/403). The gateway fetches the spec without credentials — provide a direct URL to a reachable spec, or add the schemas manually.
tools.form.error.generateSchema.generic: Something went wrong while generating the schema. Please try again.
tools.form.error.updateFailed: Failed to update tool. Please try again.
tools.form.error.createFailed: Failed to create tool. Please try again.
tools.tags.addError: Failed to add tag. Please try again.
